CustomField.description: If 'Manual Approval Required' is enabled, the Approval Status is set to 'Pending' by default. After review, mark it as 'Approved' to lock the schedule and rates. To make changes, unapprove the schedule, edit as needed, and reapprove(Use approve and un-approve buttons for the bulk edits and regeneration). The schedule must be approved for utilization generation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If 'Manual Approval Required' is enabled, the Approval Status is set to 'Pending' by default. After review, mark it as 'Approved' to lock the schedule and rates. To make changes, unapprove the schedule, edit as needed, and reapprove(Use approve and un-approve buttons for the bulk edits and regeneration). The schedule must be approved for utilization generation.
CustomField.label: Approval Status
